title: Mellow Canadian Tomato Confit
description: A slow-cooked confit recipe featuring the warmth of Szechuan peppercorns, perfect for a date-night in.

ingredients.name: tomatoes
ingredients.notes: heirloom or cherry tomatoes work well

instructions: Rinse the tomatoes and dry them with a paper towel.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the Szechuan peppercorns and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the garlic and shallots, cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, until softened.
Add the thyme, bay leaves, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the tomatoes to the pot, stirring gently to coat with the oil and spice mixture.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and cook for 2 1/2 hours, or until the tomatoes are tender and caramelized.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Using a slotted spoon, transfer the confit tomatoes to a serving dish.
Strain the juices from the pot and discard the solids.
Serve the confit tomatoes with the juices spooned over the top.
